comment.body:
Websites (Owned by Future PLC) that are ignoring or circumventing ad blockers

- space.com
- techradar.com
- tomshardware.com
- gamesradar.com
- pcgamer.com
- tomsguide.com

Have found these so far that are actively featuring ads despite intensive blocks in place. 


![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/22345038-857c-47a6-907e-984a36f8ee95)

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/dd67a4fc-386a-4702-a292-9e2947bdcd58)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://v.youku.com/v_show/id_XMzkyNTIzNzI4.html?s=cc0053ea962411de83b1&scm=20140719.apircmd.298639.video_XMzkyNTIzNzI4&spm=a2hkt.13141534.298639.d_1_1](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fv.youku.com%2Fv_show%2Fid_XMzkyNTIzNzI4.html%3Fs%3Dcc0053ea962411de83b1%26scm%3D20140719.apircmd.298639.video_XMzkyNTIzNzI4%26spm%3Da2hkt.13141534.298639.d_1_1) ### Comment > 右边是切换集数的列表；连续切换多次集，比如连续切换10次或者20次，会有那么一两次停留在截图中的状态，然后在背景播放声音版广告（但是没有画面），目前确认是一个概率问题，在剩下的绝大多数情况下，加载1秒后就能正常播放视频。有时候切集遇到广告后，再次刷新一下页面，广告就没有的情况非常常见。仅使用Easylist China列表时，广告可以100%被挡掉，而且切集的时候不需要等待加载1秒。由于Easylist China无法挡下爱奇艺（iqiyi.com）上的视频广告，因此希望Adguard Chinese仅从Easylist China处移植v.youku.com相关内容。 ``` Username: @janson403 ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/895rdb4wtc004k0oswg84sc8g0wo8ckk29q9j8b9fk.png?nc=1)

### Issue URL (Ads) [https://v.youku.com/v_show/id_XMzkyNTIzNzI4.html?s=cc0053ea962411de83b1&scm=20140719.apircmd.298639.video_XMzkyNTIzNzI4&spm=a2hkt.13141534.298639.d_1_1](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fv.youku.com%2Fv_show%2Fid_XMzkyNTIzNzI4.html%3Fs%3Dcc0053ea962411de83b1%26scm%3D20140719.apircmd.298639.video_XMzkyNTIzNzI4%26spm%3Da2hkt.13141534.298639.d_1_1) ### Comment > 右边是切换集数的列表；连续切换多次集，比如连续切换10次或者20次，会有那么一两次停留在截图中的状态，然后在背景播放声音版广告（但是没有画面），目前确认是一个概率问题，在剩下的绝大多数情况下，加载1秒后就能正常播放视频。有时候切集遇到广告后，再次刷新一下页面，广告就没有的情况非常常见。仅使用Easylist China列表时，广告可以100%被挡掉，而且切集的时候不需要等待加载1秒。由于Easylist China无法挡下爱奇艺（iqiyi.com）上的视频广告，因此希望Adguard Chinese仅从Easylist China处移植v.youku.com相关内容。 ``` Username: @janson403 ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/895rdb4wtc004k0oswg84sc8g0wo8ckk29q9j8b9fk.png?nc=1)

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://v.youku.com/v_show/id_XMzkyNTIzNzI4.html?s=cc0053ea962411de83b1&scm=20140719.apircmd.298639.video_XMzkyNTIzNzI4&spm=a2hkt.13141534.298639.d_1_1](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fv.youku.com%2Fv_show%2Fid_XMzkyNTIzNzI4.html%3Fs%3Dcc0053ea962411de83b1%26scm%3D20140719.apircmd.298639.video_XMzkyNTIzNzI4%26spm%3Da2hkt.13141534.298639.d_1_1) ### Comment > 右边是切换集数的列表；连续切换多次集，比如连续切换10次或者20次，会有那么一两次停留在截图中的状态，然后在背景播放声音版广告（但是没有画面），目前确认是一个概率问题，在剩下的绝大多数情况下，加载1秒后就能正常播放视频。有时候切集遇到广告后，再次刷新一下页面，广告就没有的情况非常常见。仅使用Easylist China列表时，广告可以100%被挡掉，而且切集的时候不需要等待加载1秒。由于Easylist China无法挡下爱奇艺（iqiyi.com）上的视频广告，因此希望Adguard Chinese仅从Easylist China处移植v.youku.com相关内容。 ``` Username: @janson403 ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/895rdb4wtc004k0oswg84sc8g0wo8ckk29q9j8b9fk.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.8 Browser: | Edge AdGuard driver: | WFP Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
AdGuard URL Tracking filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter

**Security:**
Online Malicious URL Blocklist

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Chinese filter,
CJX's Annoyances List Tracking protection: | disabled DNS filtering: | server: `System`, `Default` Browsing Security: | disabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | disabled Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.info/settings/import.html?product_type=win&product_version=7.22.8&system_version=&browser=edge&filters=2.11.3.17.18.19.20.21.208.224.220&dns.servers=System%2CDefault&dns.filters_enabled=false&dns.enabled=true&browsing_security.enabled=false&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&win.wfp=true)

issue.title: www.techradar.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [NSFW] [http://pornhub.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fpornhub.com%2F) ### Comment > I have tried using Adguard on windows and the browser extension (for Brave). Using it windows does not block pornhub. It does block other sites, but it only prevents the thumbnails and pictures from loading. The sites can still be accessed. Manually changing the DNS addresses in Windows works, but because that makes certain Youtube videos disappear, I want to avoid using that. Using the browser extension does not block the porn sites at all. I have tried turning off Brave Shields. ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/ja056lbd6u0cckc08oc8gcsws4okwkse0zc89qsn8g.png?nc=1) [Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/1q7odffwjhdwo0g84k404sgsg0wgco4tpltkenmo3k.png?nc=1) [Screenshot 3](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/20eptxmi1mpwg4kkwo00swg0kksgcs4hi7z22vy5s8.png?nc=1) [Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/jul44o36iw0g8sk4swk8ogkksksossk5xf2aoule1w.png?nc=1) ### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.43 System version: | `Windows 11 25H2` Browser: | brave Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**

### Issue URL (Ads) [https://v.youku.com/v_show/id_XMzkyNTIzNzI4.html?s=cc0053ea962411de83b1&scm=20140719.apircmd.298639.video_XMzkyNTIzNzI4&spm=a2hkt.13141534.298639.d_1_1](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fv.youku.com%2Fv_show%2Fid_XMzkyNTIzNzI4.html%3Fs%3Dcc0053ea962411de83b1%26scm%3D20140719.apircmd.298639.video_XMzkyNTIzNzI4%26spm%3Da2hkt.13141534.298639.d_1_1) ### Comment > 右边是切换集数的列表；连续切换多次集，比如连续切换10次或者20次，会有那么一两次停留在截图中的状态，然后在背景播放声音版广告（但是没有画面），目前确认是一个概率问题，在剩下的绝大多数情况下，加载1秒后就能正常播放视频。有时候切集遇到广告后，再次刷新一下页面，广告就没有的情况非常常见。仅使用Easylist China列表时，广告可以100%被挡掉，而且切集的时候不需要等待加载1秒。由于Easylist China无法挡下爱奇艺（iqiyi.com）上的视频广告，因此希望Adguard Chinese仅从Easylist China处移植v.youku.com相关内容。 ``` Username: @janson403 ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/895rdb4wtc004k0oswg84sc8g0wo8ckk29q9j8b9fk.png?nc=1)
